quota.percent99: Storage almost full - clean up immediately

draft.label: Draft
draft.saveHint: Ctrl+Enter to save, Escape to cancel

empty.message: Start by pasting text, URLs, images, or dropping files

backup.title: Backup Data
backup.description: Download a backup of all your data as a JSON file
backup.error: Failed to create backup. Please try again.

restore.title: Restore Data
restore.description: Import data from a previously exported backup file
restore.confirmMessage: This will replace all your current data with the backup. This action cannot be undone.
restore.error: Failed to restore data. Please try again.
restore.errorInvalidFile: Invalid backup file. Please select a valid .json file.
restore.errorVersion: Backup version is incompatible with current database version.
